hero.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
hero.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

aries.general: Today is a day of new beginnings. Embrace the changes coming your way!
aries.love: You might find unexpected passion blooming in your relationships.
aries.career: A collaboration at work could lead to groundbreaking ideas.

taurus.general: Patience is key today. Take your time to assess situations thoroughly.
taurus.love: A heart-to-heart conversation could strengthen your bond.
taurus.career: Stability at work will allow you to showcase your skills.

gemini.general: Communication is your ally today. Speak your truth.
gemini.love: Be open to new connections. They may surprise you.
gemini.career: Networking could bring valuable opportunities your way.

cancer.general: Nurturing yourself is essential today. Make self-care a priority.
cancer.love: Emotional depth in relationships will lead to greater understanding.
cancer.career: A supportive colleague may offer guidance.

leo.general: Confidence is your biggest asset today. Shine bright!
leo.love: A spontaneous date night could reignite the spark.
leo.career: Showcase your leadership qualities and inspire others.

virgo.general: Focus on the details today. They matter more than you think.
virgo.love: A misunderstanding could be smoothed over with patience.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills will be your secret weapon.

libra.general: Balance is key today. Find harmony in chaos.
libra.love: Compromise will be necessary for relationship harmony.
libra.career: Seek collaboration; teamwork can yield great results.

scorpio.general: Introspection will lead to growth. Don’t shy away from deep thoughts.
scorpio.love: Vulnerability can deepen intimacy with your partner.
scorpio.career: Your passion will draw others to you; use it wisely.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls! Embrace the opportunity to explore.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity will spice things up in your love life.
sagittarius.career: A new project could ignite your enthusiasm.

capricorn.general: Ambition fuels your day. Set your goals high.
capricorn.love: Honesty in communication will strengthen your bonds.
capricorn.career: Hard work pays off; recognition is on the horizon.

aquarius.general: Innovative ideas flow easily today. Don’t hold back.
aquarius.love: A unique date could bring you closer to someone special.
aquarius.career: Your unconventional ideas may lead to success.

pisces.general: Intuition guides you today. Trust your instincts.
pisces.love: Empathy will be key in resolving any misunderstandings.
pisces.career: Creative solutions will arise from collaborative efforts.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
professional.author: Robert Collier

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
motivation.author: Confucius

motivation.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
motivation.author: Norman Vaughan

captions.text: Stay curious; the world is full of possibilities.
Every day is a fresh start.
Embrace the glorious mess that you are.
Let your smile change the world.

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The great myth of our times is that technology is communication.
tech.author: Libby Larsen

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: Technology is a word that describes something that doesn’t work yet.
tech.author: Douglas Adams

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: Life is too important to be taken seriously.
fun.author: Oscar Wilde

fun.text: Why so serious? Let's have some fun!
If you want to be happy, be.
fun.author: Leo Tolstoy

fun.text: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
fun.author: Peter Drucker

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is believing in something when Common sense tells you not to.
faith.author: George Seaton

faith.text: Miracles happen to those who believe in them.
faith.author: Bernard Berenson

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: In the face of uncertainty, let your faith be your compass.

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: It is the mark of an educated mind to be able to entertain a thought without accepting it.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein
